nameMeanings.name: Audlem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

en.lifeSummary: Audlem was born about 1263, in Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs Audlem.
